items.name: Ant Design Pro v6 Enterprise Dashboard
items.reuse_policy: Code may be used, copied, modified, merged, published, distributed, sublicensed, and sold under MIT; retain the copyright and license notice in copies or substantial portions.
items.access_status: Free, public repository and preview; no login required to access source code, templates, documentation, or demo.
skill_usage_notes: Reuse the Analysis, Monitor, Workplace, Table List, Advanced Form, Account Center, Account Settings, and AI Assistant page structures for production admin applications.
Use Ant Design Pro layout density, responsive navigation, filter forms, status tables, charts, result states, and exception pages as references for complex operations dashboards.
Keep domain branding independent from Ant Design Pro branding and replace demo data, icons, and product copy.
Prefer design tokens and documented component APIs over hard-coded visual values.
Retain the MIT copyright and license notice when copying substantial code or templates.

dedupe.normalized_name: ant design pro v6 enterprise dashboard

verification.meaningful_update: Current v6 stack documents React 19, Ant Design 6, Umi Max 4, Tailwind CSS v4, antd-style, AI Assistant, responsive templates, and light/dark previews.
